canonical_columns.particle_id: dimensionless integer unique within one run
canonical_columns.tof_us: positive detector arrival time in microseconds
canonical_columns.hit: boolean; only true detector hits enter peak metrics
canonical_columns.initial_x_mm: initial global x coordinate in millimetres
canonical_columns.initial_y_mm: initial global y coordinate in millimetres
canonical_columns.initial_z_mm: initial global z coordinate in millimetres

definitions.reported_primary_fwhm: direct half-height width of the canonical Gaussian KDE around its global maximum

kde.padding: max(20 percent of sample range, 4 sample standard deviations)
kde.known_smoothing_effect: The direct KDE FWHM includes Gaussian-kernel smoothing and is therefore slightly wider than 2.3548 sigma even for a Gaussian sample; both values must be reported.

input_policy.generated_sequential_particle_ids: allowed only for unpaired single-spectrum human imports; forbidden for paired cross-solver validation
input_policy.nonfinite_or_nonpositive_tof: reject for hit=true; missing TOF is allowed for hit=false
